{"inp":{"code":"# Let's compute the indicators based on the derived numbers.
shares = 249_483_956
price = 2.60
market_cap = price * shares
debt = 1_074_626_000
cash = 172_141_000
ev = market_cap + debt - cash
rev12 = 668_357_000
net_income12 = -9_238_000
ebit12 = 50_770_000
dep_amort = -97_784_000
# EBITDA12 = EBIT12 + Depreciation & Amortization (note sign convention; using value as positive for EBITDA magnitude)
ebitda12 = ebit12 + dep_amort  # since dep_amort is negative
# Totals
assets12 = 3_061_346_000
liab_curr = 437_914_000
curr_assets = 138_882_000
patrim12 = 933_020_000
lpa = net_income12 / shares
vpa = patrim12 / shares
roe = (net_income12) / patrim12
roic_denom = assets12 - 129_154_000 - cash  # using approximated suppliers and cash as per earlier calc
roic = ebit12 / roic_denom
giro_ativos = rev12 / assets12
liquidez_corr = curr_assets / liab_curr
psr = price / (rev12 / shares)
p_ebit = price / (ebit12 / shares)
p_ativos = price / (assets12 / shares)
p_vp = price / (patrim12 / shares)
p_ev_ebit = ev / ebit12
p_ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda12 if ebitda12 != 0 else None
lpa_2dec = round(lpa, 5)
margin_bruta = 173_453_000 / rev12  # gross margin using gross profit from 12m (assumed)
margin_ebit = ebit12 / rev12
margin_liq = net_income12 / rev12
# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit12 / assets12

print("Market Cap:", market_cap)
print("EV:", ev)
print("EBITDA12:", ebitda12)
print("LPA:", lpa_2dec)
print("P/L:", price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None)
print("P/VP:", p_vp)
print("PSR:", psr)
print("P/EBIT:", p_ebit)
print("P/Ativos:", p_ativos)
print("Giro Ativos:", giro_ativos)
print("ROIC:", roic)
print("ROE:", roe)
print("Liquidez Corr:", liquidez_corr)
print("Marg Bruta:", margin_bruta)
print("Marg EBIT:", margin_ebit)
print("Marg Líquida:", margin_liq)
print("EBIT / Ativo:", ebit_ativo)
print("Giro Ativos (percent):", giro_ativos*100)
"} }
